action.reasoning: Observation: baseline is valid with exploration_score 0.5943; failures dominate rooms and tunnels, and successful distances are high. Analysis: before another eval, inspect and extend existing code carefully, then run a broader heuristic search on more training maps to identify better utility-distance tradeoffs and planner variants. Decision: update model.py/train.py to support multiple scoring modes and adaptive type-specific configs, run moderate search, then submit eval if checkpoint is produced.
